scores.correctness_notes: Gets the two events correct (certificate_available, certificate_denied) and covers initial request and post-denial cases. However, misses the explicitly required 'when revoked by provider' case from the gold standard. Describes automatic renewal logic not mentioned in the gold standard, which may be from a different library version.
scores.hallucination_notes: Describes TLSCertificatesRequiresV4/TLSCertificatesProvidesV4 class names, renewal_relative_time parameter, refresh_events parameter, CertificateRequestAttributes, chain_as_pem(), and renew_certificate() — these appear to be from the older ops-lib-tls-certificates v4 API rather than the current charmlibs.interfaces.tls_certificates v1 package. The CertificateError fields (provider, endpoint) are quite specific and may not exist. These are likely minor inaccuracies from a version mismatch rather than fully fabricated items.
